hero.art_prompt: Kabir, an 18 year old Indian boy, excited at a laptop showing rising social media engagement, creative and confident, modern home, aspirational mood.

panels.narration: Kabir could turn any post into a trend.
panels.img_prompt: Kabir, 18, cheerfully creating content on a laptop and phone, social engagement rising, creative energetic mood, modern room.

panels.narration: But he had no degree to build a career on it.
panels.img_prompt: Kabir looking thoughtful, wondering how to turn his social media skill into a real career, laptop open, modest room.

panels.narration: Then he found a BBA in Digital Marketing, online.
panels.img_prompt: Kabir's face lighting up with excitement at a laptop showing a BBA in Digital Marketing, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: He enrolled and began learning the real craft.
panels.img_prompt: Kabir confidently starting his first digital marketing lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: Why A BBA In Digital Marketing
points: Learn the real craft: SEO, social media, online ads, content and analytics.
Apply real AI marketing tools from your very first semester.
₹50,000/year with 0% interest EMI, or 15% off on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ recognised degree employers trust.
